allow: Bash(# Also handle files without common extensions but that are text \(like Makefile, Dockerfile, Containerfile, LICENSE, etc.\) find . -not -path ''./.git/*'' -type f \\\( -name ''Makefile'' -o -name ''Dockerfile*'' -o -name ''Containerfile*'' -o -name ''LICENSE'' -o -name ''Podfile'' -o -name ''Gemfile'' -o -name ''.gitignore'' -o -name ''.env*'' -o -name ''*.podman*'' \\\) -print0 | xargs -0 grep -l -i ''jordy'')
Bash(# Check for any remaining files containing ''jordy'' that we might have missed \(excluding .git and binary files\) grep -rl --exclude-dir=''.git'' --binary-files=without-match -i ''jordy'' .)

Bash(# Handle the remaining files find . -not -path ''./.git/*'' -type f \\\( -name ''*.svg'' -o -name ''*.mdx'' -o -name ''*.go'' -o -name ''*.mod'' -o -name ''*.ps1'' -o -name ''*.xcconfig'' -o -name ''*.kts'' -o -name ''*.pro'' -o -name ''Appfile'' -o -name ''Fastfile'' -o -name ''.dockerignore'' -o -name ''.secrets.baseline'' -o -name ''CNAME'' -o -name ''*.example'' \\\) -print0 | xargs -0 grep -l -i ''jordy'')
Bash(# Also handle the runtime JS file grep -rl --exclude-dir=''.git'' --binary-files=without-match -i ''jordy'' .)
Bash(# Verify no more jordy references remain in text files grep -rl --exclude-dir=''.git'' --binary-files=without-match -i ''jordy'' .)
Bash(# Check what exact claw references remain - likely in syntax highlighting data grep -o ''[^ ]*claw[^ ]*'' ./openclaw/extensions/diffs/assets/viewer-runtime.js)
